heavyHit: That's not an opinion landing, that's {evidence} — replicated.
Significant effect. Very significant, from where you're standing.
combo: Three observations, one trend line, zero outliers — the case for {stanceFor} is now a curve, and you are under it.
Jab, jab, conclusion. That's what a body of evidence feels like.
special: WEIGHT OF EVIDENCE. Every point I've landed on {topic}, published at once. Peer-reviewed by your face.
The full dataset drops — findings: conclusive.
whiff: Interesting. Recording that as an outlier.
blocked: Blocked — controlling for that variable next time.
Your skepticism is noted and will be overwhelmed.
counter: Citation needed — and {opponent} doesn't have one. I do: {expert} agrees.
Your claim just failed replication. Publicly.
victory: On {topic}, the results are in: p < whatever you were hoping for.
The evidence was sufficient. It usually is.
defeat: The data... supported them? Run it again.

special: WEIGHT OF EVIDENCE — on {topic}? You picked the one arena where I AM the home team.
